    T

    tabdb - Variable in class logicControllers.PaymentController
    Data access object for table-related database operations.
    Table - Class in Entities
    Represents a table in the restaurant.
    Table(int, int) - Constructor for class Entities.Table
    Constructs a new table with a given ID and capacity.
    Table(int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class Entities.Table
    Constructs a table with a given ID, capacity, and availability.
    tableController - Variable in class logicControllers.DailyFunctionController
     
    TableController - Class in logicControllers
    Controller responsible for physical table management within the restaurant.
    TableController() - Constructor for class logicControllers.TableController
    Initializes the controller with the necessary Data Access Objects.
    tableDAO - Variable in class logicControllers.DailyFunctionController

    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Table entities and their persistence logic.

    Data access object for table-related database operations.
    TabledbController - Variable in class logicControllers.TableController
     
    tableId - Variable in class messages.DeleteTableRequest
    The unique identifier (ID) of the table to delete.
    tableId - Variable in class messages.InsertTableRequest
    The unique identifier (ID) to be assigned to the new table.
    tableId - Variable in class messages.UpdateTableRequest
    The unique identifier (ID) of the table to be updated.
    tableID - Variable in class Entities.Reservation
     
    tableID - Variable in class Entities.Table
    Unique identifier for the table.
